ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Continued To Jun-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Gilbert Jay, Esq., in court, for and with Camelia-Kam Fung Ng, proposed successor Administrator.

Faye Lee, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for and with Aijian Zhang, Special Administrator of the Estate of Denny Ng.

The following matters are called together: PES-01-282440 and PES-22-305699.

At the court's query, counsel offers updates regarding their respective positions. There is discussion re possible settlement via pro bono mediation or another form of dispute resolution. The court suggests the parties try to resolve via a Settlement Conference before a Judge. The parties agree to the preceding and are instructed to contact the ADR Coordinator to schedule a settlement conference. Counsel is provided with the ADR Coordinator's telephone number and email address.

The subject matters are all continued to Jun-02-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status Hearing RE: Mediation or Settlement Conference is added to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Continued To Mar-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Peter Bresler, Esq., for Miemy Bo Lip Lau, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports on his failure to appear at the last calling. At conclusion of the report, the court finds that good cause does not exist for failing to appear and orders sanctions in the amount to $250.00 payable to the clerk of the court within ten (10) days.

Counsel reports that a petition is pending in the court's e-filing queue. The court acknowledges the preceding.

The order to show cause is taken off calendar. The remaining subject matter is continued to Mar-25-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept.204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Feb-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and order to show cause will be issued to the Attorney Peter Bresler to appear on February 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed under CCP 128 for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
